title: @you/subagent
description: Look up the packaged @you/subagent factory: canonical name, a one-sentence description, concrete named-run examples, and a link to the complete parent definition.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: @you/subagent is the packaged named factory that runs a one-pass subagent request from init until the task reaches a complete or failed terminal state.

invocationExamples.title: Invocation examples
invocationExamples.body: Invoke the packaged factory by canonical name with you run --named. Pass the request as a positional argument or on stdin.

completeDefinition.title: Complete definition
completeDefinition.body: The parent Packaged Factory Reference keeps the complete packaged definition source and published metadata for this package.

deterministicReplay.title: Deterministic replay
deterministicReplay.body: Inspect a full-mode deterministic work-graph replay for the packaged subagent recording: timeline scrubber, topology, and work progress.

links.completeDefinition: Complete @you/subagent definition on Packaged Factory Reference
